import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

# Tile and color constants
PYRAMID = 5
BALL = 3
KEY = 7
HEX = 11
FLOOR = 1
EMPTY = 0

BLUE = 3
GREEN = 2
YELLOW = 5

DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)], dtype=jnp.int32)


def get_observation(state):
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)

    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    # Agent position and direction
    agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32) / (H_f - 1)
    agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32) / (W_f - 1)
    dir_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4)  # (4,)

    # Blue pyramid location
    blue_pyr_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    blue_pyr_count = jnp.sum(blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    blue_pyr_y = jnp.sum(yy * blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0) / (H_f - 1)
    blue_pyr_x = jnp.sum(xx * blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0) / (W_f - 1)
    blue_pyr_exists = jnp.clip(blue_pyr_count, 0.0, 1.0)

    # Yellow hex location
    yellow_hex_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == HEX) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    yellow_hex_count = jnp.sum(yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    yellow_hex_y = jnp.sum(yy * yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yellow_hex_count, 1.0) / (H_f - 1)
    yellow_hex_x = jnp.sum(xx * yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yellow_hex_count, 1.0) / (W_f - 1)
    yellow_hex_exists = jnp.clip(yellow_hex_count, 0.0, 1.0)

    # Pocket contents
    pocket_tile = state.agent.pocket[0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
    pocket_color = state.agent.pocket[1].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
    pocket_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == EMPTY).astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_green_ball = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN)).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Relative positions (agent -> blue pyramid)
    rel_pyr_dy = (blue_pyr_y - agent_y)
    rel_pyr_dx = (blue_pyr_x - agent_x)

    # Relative positions (agent -> yellow hex)
    rel_hex_dy = (yellow_hex_y - agent_y)
    rel_hex_dx = (yellow_hex_x - agent_x)

    # Front tile info
    dy = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][0]
    dx = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][1]
    front_y = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy, 0, H - 1)
    front_x = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx, 0, W - 1)
    front_tile_id = state.grid[front_y, front_x, 0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
    front_tile_color = state.grid[front_y, front_x, 1].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
    front_is_blue_pyr = ((state.grid[front_y, front_x, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[front_y, front_x, 1] == BLUE)).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_floor = (state.grid[front_y, front_x, 0] == FLOOR).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Manhattan distances (normalized)
    dist_to_pyr = (jnp.abs(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32) - jnp.sum(yy * blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0))
                   + jnp.abs(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32) - jnp.sum(xx * blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0))) / (H_f + W_f)

    dist_to_hex = (jnp.abs(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32) - jnp.sum(yy * yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yellow_hex_count, 1.0))
                   + jnp.abs(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32) - jnp.sum(xx * yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yellow_hex_count, 1.0))) / (H_f + W_f)

    # Step progress
    step_norm = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 400.0

    # Adjacency to yellow hex (are we next to it?)
    agent_y_int = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32)
    agent_x_int = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32)
    hex_y_int = (jnp.sum(yy * yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yellow_hex_count, 1.0)).astype(jnp.int32)
    hex_x_int = (jnp.sum(xx * yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yellow_hex_count, 1.0)).astype(jnp.int32)
    manhattan_to_hex = jnp.abs(agent_y_int - hex_y_int) + jnp.abs(agent_x_int - hex_x_int)
    adjacent_to_hex = (manhattan_to_hex <= 1).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Green ball on grid (already placed)
    green_ball_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == BALL) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    green_ball_count = jnp.sum(green_ball_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    green_ball_y = jnp.sum(yy * green_ball_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(green_ball_count, 1.0) / (H_f - 1)
    green_ball_x = jnp.sum(xx * green_ball_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(green_ball_count, 1.0) / (W_f - 1)
    green_ball_exists = jnp.clip(green_ball_count, 0.0, 1.0)

    obs = jnp.array([
        agent_y, agent_x,                          # 2
        dir_oh[0], dir_oh[1], dir_oh[2], dir_oh[3], # 4
        blue_pyr_y, blue_pyr_x, blue_pyr_exists,   # 3
        yellow_hex_y, yellow_hex_x, yellow_hex_exists, # 3
        pocket_tile, pocket_color,                 # 2
        pocket_empty, holding_green_ball,          # 2
        rel_pyr_dy, rel_pyr_dx,                    # 2
        rel_hex_dy, rel_hex_dx,                    # 2
        dist_to_pyr, dist_to_hex,                  # 2
        front_tile_id, front_tile_color,           # 2
        front_is_blue_pyr, front_is_floor,         # 2
        adjacent_to_hex,                           # 1
        green_ball_y, green_ball_x, green_ball_exists, # 3
        step_norm,                                 # 1
    ], dtype=jnp.float32)

    return obs


def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)

    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    # Yellow hex position
    yellow_hex_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == HEX) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    yellow_hex_count = jnp.sum(yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    hex_y = jnp.sum(yy * yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yellow_hex_count, 1.0)
    hex_x = jnp.sum(xx * yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yellow_hex_count, 1.0)

    # Next state yellow hex position (should be same)
    next_yellow_hex_mask = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == HEX) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    next_yellow_hex_count = jnp.sum(next_yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    next_hex_y = jnp.sum(yy * next_yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(next_yellow_hex_count, 1.0)
    next_hex_x = jnp.sum(xx * next_yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(next_yellow_hex_count, 1.0)

    # Blue pyramid position in current state
    blue_pyr_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    blue_pyr_count = jnp.sum(blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_y = jnp.sum(yy * blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    pyr_x = jnp.sum(xx * blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)

    # Agent positions
    agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    next_agent_y = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    next_agent_x = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)

    # Pocket states
    was_holding_green_ball = (state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN)
    now_holding_green_ball = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN)
    was_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == EMPTY)
    now_empty = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == EMPTY)

    # Just picked up blue pyramid (now holding green ball)
    just_picked_up = (~was_holding_green_ball) & now_holding_green_ball
    pickup_reward = jax.lax.select(just_picked_up, jnp.float32(2.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Green ball placed on grid
    next_green_ball_mask = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == BALL) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    next_green_ball_count = jnp.sum(next_green_ball_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    next_gb_y = jnp.sum(yy * next_green_ball_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(next_green_ball_count, 1.0)
    next_gb_x = jnp.sum(xx * next_green_ball_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(next_green_ball_count, 1.0)

    # Check if green ball is adjacent to yellow hex (Manhattan distance == 1)
    gb_hex_dist = jnp.abs(next_gb_y - next_hex_y) + jnp.abs(next_gb_x - next_hex_x)
    green_ball_adjacent_to_hex = (next_green_ball_count > 0) & (gb_hex_dist <= 1.0)

    # Was green ball adjacent to hex before?
    prev_green_ball_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == BALL) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    prev_green_ball_count = jnp.sum(prev_green_ball_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    prev_gb_y = jnp.sum(yy * prev_green_ball_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(prev_green_ball_count, 1.0)
    prev_gb_x = jnp.sum(xx * prev_green_ball_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(prev_green_ball_count, 1.0)
    prev_gb_hex_dist = jnp.abs(prev_gb_y - hex_y) + jnp.abs(prev_gb_x - hex_x)
    prev_green_ball_adjacent = (prev_green_ball_count > 0) & (prev_gb_hex_dist <= 1.0)

    # Task completion: just placed green ball adjacent to hex
    just_completed = green_ball_adjacent_to_hex & (~prev_green_ball_adjacent)
    # Also: was holding green ball, now empty, and ball is near hex
    just_placed_near_hex = was_holding_green_ball & now_empty & green_ball_adjacent_to_hex
    completion_reward = jax.lax.select(just_placed_near_hex, jnp.float32(10.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Dense shaping: before pickup, reward getting closer to blue pyramid
    dist_to_pyr = jnp.abs(agent_y - pyr_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - pyr_x)
    next_dist_to_pyr = jnp.abs(next_agent_y - pyr_y) + jnp.abs(next_agent_x - pyr_x)
    pyr_progress = (dist_to_pyr - next_dist_to_pyr) / (H_f + W_f)
    # Only shape toward pyramid if not yet holding green ball
    pyr_shape = jax.lax.select(~was_holding_green_ball & (blue_pyr_count > 0),
                                pyr_progress * jnp.float32(0.5), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Dense shaping: after pickup, reward getting closer to yellow hex
    dist_to_hex = jnp.abs(agent_y - hex_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - hex_x)
    next_dist_to_hex = jnp.abs(next_agent_y - next_hex_y) + jnp.abs(next_agent_x - next_hex_x)
    hex_progress = (dist_to_hex - next_dist_to_hex) / (H_f + W_f)
    hex_shape = jax.lax.select(was_holding_green_ball,
                               hex_progress * jnp.float32(0.5), jnp.float32(0.0))

    total_reward = pickup_reward + completion_reward + pyr_shape + hex_shape

    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
